zh.lifeSummary: 當Adelheid zur Lippe於1298年出生在德國福萊斯塔阿特 利普布拉可布拉可時，她的父親Simon I. zur Lippe38歲，母親Adelheid von Waldeck36歲。她和Hermann III VON EBERSTEIN Count至少有1個女兒。她去世於1324年9月29日在她的家鄉享年26歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Adelheid zur Lippe于1298年出生在德国福萊斯塔阿特 利普布拉可布拉可时，她的父亲Simon I. zur Lippe38岁，母亲Adelheid von Waldeck36岁。她和Hermann III VON EBERSTEIN Count至少有1个女儿。她去世于1324年9月29日在她的家乡享年26岁。

nameMeanings.name: zur
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Ofer, Yael, Amikam, Amram, Ari, Uri.
Jewish (Israeli): artificial name from Hebrew tsur ‘rock’. In some cases it may also be a translation of some original Ashkenazic surname with similar meaning (e.g. Fels or Stein ).
Polish (Żur): nickname from żur ‘sour soup’ (see Zurek ). Compare Schur .

variants.name: Fels
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Klaus, Kurt, Sieglinde, Wolfgang.
German: topographic name for someone who lived near high ground or by a prominent crag, from Middle High German vels ‘rock, cliff’.

nameMeanings.name: Lippe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German and Jewish (western Ashkenazic): habitational name from the duchy of Lippe, which became an independent state in the 12th century.
German: topographic name for someone living on the banks of the Lippe river in Westphalia.

variants.name: Lipp
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Alois, Frieda, Hans, Wendelin, Franz, Konrad, Otto, Rainer, Ralf.
English: nickname from Middle English lippe ‘lip’ (Old English lippa).
English: from the Middle English personal name Leppe, Lippe (pet forms of one or more Old English names containing Lēof- ‘dear, beloved’ as the first element). Compare Lewin 1.

nameMeanings.name: Adelheid
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Adelheid zur Lippe was born in 1298, in Brake, Brake, Lippe, Germany, her father, Simon I. zur Lippe, was 38 and her mother, Adelheid von Waldeck, was 36. She had at least 1 daughter with Hermann III VON EBERSTEIN Count. She died on 29 September 1324, in her hometown, at the age of 26.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adelheid zur Lippe est née en 1298, à Brake, Brake, Freistaat Lippe, Allemagne, son père, Simon I. zur Lippe, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Adelheid von Waldeck, avait 36 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fille avec Hermann III VON EBERSTEIN Count. Elle est décédée le 29 septembre 1324, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 26 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adelheid zur Lippe 1298 in Brake, Brake, Freistaat Lippe, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Simon I. zur Lippe 38 und ihre Mutter Adelheid von Waldeck 36. Sie hatte mit Hermann III VON EBERSTEIN Count mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 29. September 1324 im Alter von 26 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adelheid zur Lippe è nata il nel 1298 nel Brake, Brake, Freistaat Lippe, Germania, sua padre, Simon I. zur Lippe, aveva 38 anni e sua madre, Adelheid von Waldeck, aveva 36 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlia con Hermann III VON EBERSTEIN Count. Morì il 29 settembre 1324, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 26 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Adelheid zur Lippeが1298年にドイツフレイスタアト リップブラクブラクで生まれた時，父Simon I. zur Lippeは38歳，母Adelheid von Waldeckは36歳であった。彼女はHermann III VON EBERSTEIN Countとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1324年9月29日に故郷で26歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Adelheid zur Lippe(이)가 1298년 독일 프레이스타앳 리프 브라크 브라크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Simon I. zur Lippe(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Adelheid von Waldeck(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 Hermann III VON EBERSTEIN Count(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1324년 9월 29일 그녀의 고향에서 26세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adelheid zur Lippe nasceu em 1298, em Brake, Brake, Freistaat Lippe, Alemanha, seu pai, Simon I. zur Lippe, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Adelheid von Waldeck, tinha 36 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filha com Hermann III VON EBERSTEIN Count. Ela faleceu em 29 de setembro de 1324, em sua cidade natal, com 26 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adelheid zur Lippe родилась в 1298 г. в местности бреик, бреик, фристаат липп, Германия, её отцу по имени Simon I. zur Lippe было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Adelheid von Waldeck, 36. У неё была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Hermann III VON EBERSTEIN Count. Она умерла 29 сентября 1324 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 26 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Adelheid zur Lippe nació en 1298, en Brake, Brake, Freistaat Lippe, Alemania, su papá, Simon I. zur Lippe, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Adelheid von Waldeck, tenía 36 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Hermann III VON EBERSTEIN Count. Murió el 29 de septiembre de 1324, en su pueblo, a la edad de 26 años.
